---
title: "Data Analysis Project"
author:
  - name: "Person A"
  - name: "Person B"
date: today
---

# Introduction

Welcome to our data analysis project. This report is structured into the following chapters:

{{< include chapters/01_introduction.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/02_data.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/03_analysis.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/04_results.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/05_conclusion.qmd >}}
